name: swh_vi_vy_collapse
rule: vi~vy: consonantâ†’'vi', vowelâ†’'vy' on the following segment (high-vowel/glide-like (vocalic); alternates ['i', 'y'])

provenance.reason: opus-reviewer: ENRICHED following-vowel shows vy before a(186)/o(120)/e(51) but vi retained before u(38) [and i, n=1]; i.e. i->y glides before non-high vowels, blocked before u.
